# Coreframe.one — Digital Infrastructure for Local Impact

## About
Coreframe is a digital agency based in Hamburg, Germany, specializing in building high-performance websites, AI-powered visibility solutions, and intelligent automation for local businesses.

## Services
- Web Design & Development: High-converting, mobile-first websites built with modern frameworks (Next.js, React). Accessible, fast, and designed to impress. 99.9% uptime guaranteed.
- Local SEO: Search engine optimization focused on local rankings. We optimize content, structure, and authority for Google, Maps, and local search.
- GEO (Generative Engine Optimization): Making businesses visible to AI systems like ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, and Claude. We structure content so AI can recommend our clients.
- AI Automation: Intelligent call bots, SMS bots, and WhatsApp automation that handle customer inquiries, book appointments, and follow up on leads 24/7.
- Google My Business: Complete setup and optimization of Google Business Profiles, Maps presence, and review management strategy.
- Digital Partnership: Ongoing optimization, support, and strategic consultations. Not a one-time vendor — a long-term growth partner.

## Location
Hamburg, Germany
Serving local businesses across Germany

## Contact
Website: https://coreframe.one
Languages: English, German

## Key Facts
- 420+ local businesses connected
- 4.9 average Google rating
- 124% average traffic increase for clients
- AI-visible and optimized for generative search
- 24/7 bot automation available

## Content Structure
- Homepage: Single-page landing with sections for Hero, Value Proposition, Problem Statement, Services (Bento Grid), Case Studies, How It Works (3-step process), FAQ (6 questions), and Call-to-Action
- Available in English (/en) and German (/de)
